import { Component, signal, computed } from '@angular/core'; import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common'; import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; interface Supplement { id: string; name: string; description: string; price: number; selected: boolean; icon: string; } interface ColorSwatch { name: string; hex: string; } interface Theme { id: string; tab: string; name: string; subtitle: string; description: string; accentHex: string; gradientFrom: string; gradientTo: string; basePrice: number; badge?: string; highlights: string[]; palette: ColorSwatch[]; } interface BookingData { fullName: string; phone: string; eventDate: string; eventHour: string; baseTheme: string; notes: string; } @Component({ selector: 'app-root', standalone: true, imports: [CommonModule, FormsModule], template: `
Book Now
@if (mobileMenuOpen()) {
Chat on WhatsApp
}
Premium Event Decoration · Morocco

We help you make
happy memories.

Elegant decorations, vibrant colors and bespoke themes tailored to perfection — every arch, balloon, and detail crafted to transform your celebration into a timeless memory.

200+
Events Decorated
5 ★
Rated Service
100%
Custom Themes
Scroll
Our Collections

Explore Our Themes

Each theme is meticulously designed and handcrafted to create an atmosphere that feels magical, personal, and utterly unforgettable.

@for (tab of tabs; track tab.id) { }
@for (theme of filteredThemes(); track theme.id) {
@if (theme.badge) {
{{ theme.badge }}
} @if (selectedThemeId() === theme.id) {
}
@for (swatch of theme.palette; track swatch.name) {
}
from {{ theme.basePrice }} MAD
{{ theme.subtitle }}

{{ theme.name }}

{{ theme.description }}

@for (feat of theme.highlights.slice(0, 3); track feat) {
{{ feat }}
}
}
Package Builder

Build Your Package

Customize your experience with premium add-ons and watch your estimated total update live.

Currently Selected

{{ selectedTheme().name }}

{{ selectedTheme().subtitle }}
@for (swatch of selectedTheme().palette; track swatch.name) {
}

{{ selectedTheme().description }}

Included in Base Package
@for (feat of selectedTheme().highlights; track feat) {
{{ feat }}
}
Base Package {{ selectedTheme().basePrice }} MAD
Premium Add-Ons
@for (supp of supplements(); track supp.id) {
@if (supp.selected) { }
{{ supp.icon }}
{{ supp.name }}
{{ supp.description }}
+{{ supp.price }} MAD
add-on
}
Live Price Breakdown
Base: {{ selectedTheme().name }} {{ basePrice() }} MAD
@for (supp of supplements(); track supp.id) { @if (supp.selected) {
{{ supp.name }} +{{ supp.price }} MAD
} } @if (supplementsTotal() === 0) {
No add-ons selected yet
}
Estimated Total {{ estimatedTotal() }} MAD
Reserve Your Date

Book Your Event

Fill in your details and we'll confirm your reservation within 24 hours.

@if (!formSubmitted()) {
Selected Add-Ons (from builder)
{{ selectedSupplementNames() }}
Estimated Total: {{ estimatedTotal() }} MAD

We respond within 24 hours • WhatsApp: 0719455509

} @else {

Request Received!

Thank you for choosing Golden Event by Khaoula. We'll contact you within 24 hours to confirm every detail of your celebration.

Continue on WhatsApp
}
Golden Event
by Khaoula

Transforming your special moments into timeless memories through elegant decorations and bespoke themes.

Quick Links
Contact & Social

@goldenevent.__

© 2025 Golden Event by Khaoula. All rights reserved.

Estimated Total
{{ estimatedTotal() }}
MAD
`, }) export class AppComponent { // ── Reactive Signals ────────────────────────────────────────── activeTab = signal('baby-shower'); selectedThemeId = signal('little-princesse'); mobileMenuOpen = signal(false); formSubmitted = signal(false); supplements = signal([ { id: 'extra-arch', icon: '🌸', name: 'Additional Backdrop Arch', description: 'A second arch frame to frame the dessert table or entrance', price: 300, selected: false, }, { id: 'dessert-table', icon: '🍰', name: 'Extra Dessert Table / Plinth', description: 'Premium styling with themed linen and floral accents', price: 250, selected: false, }, { id: 'macaron-tower', icon: '🧁', name: 'Personalized Macaron Tower', description: 'Custom-coloured macarons stacked on an elegant tiered stand', price: 200, selected: false, }, { id: 'neon-sign', icon: '✨', name: 'Custom Neon Lighting Sign', description: 'LED neon with any name, phrase, or baby initials', price: 400, selected: false, }, { id: 'candy-bar', icon: '🍬', name: 'Premium Candy Bar Setup', description: 'Themed candy jars, displays, and branded packaging', price: 180, selected: false, }, { id: 'florals', icon: '💐', name: 'Luxury Floral Arrangements', description: 'Fresh or silk blooms in theme-matching hues', price: 350, selected: false, }, ]); // ── Form Data ───────────────────────────────────────────────── bookingData: BookingData = { fullName: '', phone: '+212 ', eventDate: '', eventHour: '', baseTheme: 'little-princesse', notes: '', }; // ── Tabs ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── tabs = [ { id: 'baby-shower', label: 'Baby Shower' }, { id: 'birthday', label: 'Birthdays' }, { id: 'henna', label: 'Henna & Anniversaries' }, ]; // ── Theme Data ──────────────────────────────────────────────── allThemes: Theme[] = [ { id: 'little-princesse', tab: 'baby-shower', name: 'Welcome Little Princesse', subtitle: 'Pink · White · Metallic Gold', description: 'A dreamy blush celebration for your little princess. Soft watercolour bow backdrops, balloon arches in blush and gold, an oversized luxury teddy bear with silk ribbons, and a macaron tower that steals the spotlight.', accentHex: '#E8A0B0', gradientFrom: '#FFF0F3', gradientTo: '#FEE8D6', basePrice: 800, badge: 'Most Popular', highlights: ['Watercolour Bow Backdrop', 'Blush & Gold Balloon Arch', 'Giant Luxury Teddy Bear', 'Silk Ribbon Details', 'Floral Crown Arrangement'], palette: [ { name: 'Blush', hex: '#FFB6C1' }, { name: 'Pearl', hex: '#F9F0F3' }, { name: 'Gold', hex: '#D4AF37' }, { name: 'Rose', hex: '#E8A0B0' }, ], }, { id: 'bearly-wait', tab: 'baby-shower', name: 'Bearly Wait', subtitle: 'Beige · Cream · Caramel', description: 'A cosy neutral aesthetic celebrating the little one on the way. Warm beige and cream balloon arches, charming watercolour hot-air balloon motifs, and endearing teddy bear accents with a rustic-elegant touch.', accentHex: '#C49A6C', gradientFrom: '#FFF8EE', gradientTo: '#F5E6C8', basePrice: 800, highlights: ['Hot Air Balloon Motifs', 'Neutral Tone Balloon Garland', 'Teddy Bear Centrepiece', 'Woodland Accent Props', 'Kraft & Linen Details'], palette: [ { name: 'Beige', hex: '#F5E6C8' }, { name: 'Cream', hex: '#FFF8F0' }, { name: 'Caramel', hex: '#C49A6C' }, { name: 'Sand', hex: '#C2A47E' }, ], }, { id: 'little-prince', tab: 'baby-shower', name: 'Welcome Little Prince', subtitle: 'Royal Blue · White · Gold', description: 'A regal celebration fit for royalty. Bold royal blue and sky blue balloon arches, custom floral prints, deep-blue velvet ribbons, crown accents, and a macaron tower that reigns supreme at the dessert table.', accentHex: '#4169E1', gradientFrom: '#EEF3FF', gradientTo: '#D0DEFF', basePrice: 850, badge: 'Royal Edition', highlights: ['Royal Blue Balloon Arch', 'Custom Floral Prints', 'Blue Velvet Ribbons', 'Crown & Star Accents', 'Themed Macaron Tower'], palette: [ { name: 'Royal', hex: '#4169E1' }, { name: 'Sky', hex: '#87CEEB' }, { name: 'White', hex: '#F0F4FF' }, { name: 'Gold', hex: '#D4AF37' }, ], }, { id: 'first-birthday', tab: 'birthday', name: '1st Birthday Milestone', subtitle: 'Ivory · Gold · Blush', description: 'The most precious first birthday deserves nothing but the best. An opulent setup featuring the iconic "1" numeral balloon, a luxury cake-smash backdrop, premium floral accents, and a dessert table that wows every guest.', accentHex: '#C9B037', gradientFrom: '#FFFDF0', gradientTo: '#FFF0D0', basePrice: 900, badge: 'Premium', highlights: ['Giant "1" Numeral Balloon', 'Cake-Smash Backdrop', 'Premium Floral Crown', 'Gold & Ivory Palette', 'Dessert Table Centrepiece'], palette: [ { name: 'Ivory', hex: '#FFFFF0' }, { name: 'Gold', hex: '#C9B037' }, { name: 'Blush', hex: '#FADADD' }, { name: 'Champagne', hex: '#F7E7CE' }, ], }, { id: 'birthday-custom', tab: 'birthday', name: 'Custom Birthday Theme', subtitle: 'Fully Personalised', description: 'Your vision, our execution. Any colour palette, character, or theme — from Disney princess to safari adventure. Every detail is custom-crafted to make your child\'s birthday utterly unforgettable.', accentHex: '#D4AF37', gradientFrom: '#FDFBF7', gradientTo: '#FFF5D6', basePrice: 750, badge: 'Fully Custom', highlights: ['Custom Theme Design Consultation', 'Character Integration', 'Personalised Backdrop Print', 'Themed Balloon Garland', 'Full Dessert Table Setup'], palette: [ { name: 'Gold', hex: '#D4AF37' }, { name: 'Coral', hex: '#FF6B6B' }, { name: 'Teal', hex: '#4ECDC4' }, { name: 'Lemon', hex: '#FFE66D' }, ], }, { id: 'henna-anniversary', tab: 'henna', name: 'Moroccan Henna & Anniversary', subtitle: 'Opulence · Tradition · Glamour', description: 'A breathtaking fusion of Moroccan tradition and modern luxury. Shimmering gold and ivory backdrops, ambient neon number lighting, geometric dessert tables adorned with traditional arabesque patterns, and unmatched floral elegance.', accentHex: '#B8860B', gradientFrom: '#FDF8E8', gradientTo: '#F5E6B0', basePrice: 1200, badge: 'High Tier', highlights: ['Shimmering Gold Backdrop', 'Neon Number Lighting', 'Geometric Dessert Table', 'Arabesque Pattern Accents', 'Premium Floral Columns'], palette: [ { name: 'Deep Gold', hex: '#B8860B' }, { name: 'Ivory', hex: '#FFFFF0' }, { name: 'Burgundy', hex: '#800020' }, { name: 'Bronze', hex: '#CD7F32' }, ], }, ]; // ── Computed Signals ────────────────────────────────────────── filteredThemes = computed(() => this.allThemes.filter(t => t.tab === this.activeTab()) ); selectedTheme = computed(() => this.allThemes.find(t => t.id === this.selectedThemeId()) ?? this.allThemes[0] ); basePrice = computed(() => this.selectedTheme().basePrice); supplementsTotal = computed(() => this.supplements().filter(s => s.selected).reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.price, 0) ); estimatedTotal = computed(() => this.basePrice() + this.supplementsTotal()); selectedSupplementNames = computed(() => { const names = this.supplements().filter(s => s.selected).map(s => s.name); return names.length ? names.join(', ') : 'None selected'; }); // ── Methods ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── toggleSupplement(id: string): void { this.supplements.update(list => list.map(s => s.id === id ? { ...s, selected: !s.selected } : s) ); } selectTheme(themeId: string): void { this.selectedThemeId.set(themeId); this.bookingData.baseTheme = themeId; const theme = this.allThemes.find(t => t.id === themeId); if (theme) this.activeTab.set(theme.tab); } switchTab(tabId: string): void { this.activeTab.set(tabId); const first = this.allThemes.find(t => t.tab === tabId); if (first) this.selectedThemeId.set(first.id); } scrollTo(sectionId: string): void { const el = document.getElementById(sectionId); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); this.mobileMenuOpen.set(false); } onFormSubmit(): void { // In production, replace 'placeholder' with your real Formspree form ID. // For the prototype we simulate success immediately. this.formSubmitted.set(true); window.scrollTo({ top: document.getElementById('book')?.offsetTop ?? 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); } }
